title: Type Property_VG
description: Returns the type of a vision object.
notes: Use the Type property to determine the type of an object at runtime.  This is useful for generic functions such as for data logging that need the object type in order to know which properties and / or results to access.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: All Objects

Objects Property
examples:
Integer i, count, objType, score
Real area
VGet seq1.Objects.Count, count
For i = 1 To count VGet seq1.Objects(i).Type, objType
Select objType Case VISION_OBJTYPE_CORRELATION
    VGet seq1.Objects(i).Score, score
    ' log some data here Case VISION_OBJTYPE_BLOB
    VGet seq1.Objects(i).Area, area
    ' log some data here Send
Next i
